meta.name: Pentatonic
meta.description: Four pentatonic scales (one per corner). 32-step sequencer @ 55.5 BPM. 'hit 1' plays with diagonal probability: 2% per step at LD/BL corner (ss, minor pentatonic), 50% per step at RT/TR corner (fp, suspended pentatonic). Pitch is randomly chosen from the dominant corner's pentatonic scale, transposed within C1-C3.
